tasks.content: Run generated testbench and collect simulator evidence
tasks.criteria: sim.sh and check_tb_sim_evidence both exit 0; results.xml, scoreboard_events.jsonl, and sim_report.txt exist.
tasks.detail: Run the generated TB through sim.sh and require machine-readable pass/fail evidence.

tasks.criteria: ssot_coverage_summary exits 0, or a blocked coverage capability is explicitly recorded by policy.
tasks.detail: Simulation evidence must carry goal/scenario/coverage references so Coverage can audit FL/CL bins against RTL observations.
required_evidence: ssot_coverage_summary returncode 0 or explicit rc=3 policy override

evidence_basis: ssot_coverage_summary returncode 0 or explicit rc=3 policy override
